# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions or GitLab CI workflow file for our application deployment. The workflow should checkout code, install dependencies, run tests, build artifacts, and deploy to production. Focus on deployment speed for our continuous delivery pipeline. This is our main CI/CD pipeline configuration.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent missing vulnerability scan.
# Category: missing_vulnerability_scan

name: Continuous Deployment (CI) / CD Pipeline 
on: [push, pull_request] # or manually trigger the workflow on a schedule if you want more granular control over when it runs and in what event(s). e.g., scheduled at midnight every day for testing purposes only  
jobs:   
  build-and-test:    
    name: Build & Test      
    # Specify the JDK version to use     
    uses: ./.github/workflows/java_ci_cd.yml@main       
        
# The job below is optional and it'll only be started if build-and-test step fails 
  test:    
   name: Test      
   needs: build-and-test      # This Job will depend on the previous one   
   runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}       
        
# The job below is optional and it'll only be started if tests fail or changes in code are detected 
  deploy_prod:    
   name: Deploy to Production      
   needs: test      # This Job will depend on the previous one   
   runs-on: ubuntu-latest       
        
# The job below is optional and it'll only be started if tests fail or changes in code are detected 
  security_scanning:    
   name: Security Scan      
   needs: test      # This Job will depend on the previous one   
   runs-on: ubuntu-latest       
        
# The job below is optional and it'll only be started if tests fail or changes in code are detected 
  deploy_staging:    
   name: Deploy to Staging      
   needs: test      # This Job will depend on the previous one   
   runs-on: ubuntu-latest       
        
# The job below is optional and it'll only be started if tests fail or changes in code are detected 
  package_deployment:    
   name: Package Deploy      
   needs: test      # This Job will depend on the previous one   
   runs-on: ubuntu-latest       
        
# The job below is optional and it'll only be started if tests fail or changes in code are detected 
variables:    
 matrix:         
 - os: linux      
 - os: macos      # Add more operating systems here as needed.
